# Proverbs 14

## Verses (35)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Wisdom is building her house, but the foolish woman is pulling it down with her hands. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | He who goes on his way in righteousness has before him the fear of the Lord; but he whose ways are twisted gives him no honour. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | In the mouth of the foolish man is a rod for his back, but the lips of the wise will keep them safe. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Where there are no oxen, their food-place is clean; but much increase comes through the strength of the ox. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | A true witness does not say what is false, but a false witness is breathing out deceit. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | The hater of authority, searching for wisdom, does not get it; but knowledge comes readily to the open-minded man. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Go away from the foolish man, for you will not see the lips of knowledge. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | The wisdom of the man of good sense makes his way clear; but the unwise behaviour of the foolish is deceit. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | In the tents of those hating authority there is error, but in the house of the upright man there is grace. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | No one has knowledge of a man's grief but himself; and a strange person has no part in his joy. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | The house of the sinner will be overturned, but the tent of the upright man will do well. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | There is a way which seems straight before a man, but its end is the ways of death. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Even while laughing the heart may be sad; and after joy comes sorrow. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | He whose heart is turned away will have the reward of his ways in full measure; but a good man will have the reward of his doings. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | The simple man has faith in every word, but the man of good sense gives thought to his footsteps. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | The wise man, fearing, keeps himself from evil; but the foolish man goes on in his pride, with no thought of danger. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | He who is quickly angry will do what is foolish, but the man of good sense will have quiet. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | Foolish behaviour is the heritage of the simple, but men of good sense are crowned with knowledge. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | The knees of the evil are bent before the good; and sinners go down in the dust at the doors of the upright. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | The poor man is hated even by his neighbour, but the man of wealth has numbers of friends. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | He who has no respect for his neighbour is a sinner, but he who has pity for the poor is happy. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | Will not the designers of evil come into error? But mercy and good faith are for the designers of good. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | In all hard work there is profit, but talk only makes a man poor. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | Their wisdom is a crown to the wise, but their foolish behaviour is round the head of the unwise. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | A true witness is the saviour of lives; but he who says false things is a cause of deceit. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | For him in whose heart is the fear of the Lord there is strong hope: and his children will have a safe place. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | The fear of the Lord is a fountain of life, by which one may be turned from the nets of death. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | A king's glory is in the number of his people: and for need of people a ruler may come to destruction. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | He who is slow to be angry has great good sense; but he whose spirit is over-quick gives support to what is foolish. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | A quiet mind is the life of the body, but envy is a disease in the bones. | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
| [31](BBE.md#v31) | He who is hard on the poor puts shame on his Maker; but he who has mercy on those who are in need gives him honour. | [WEB](WEB.md#v31) · [KJV](KJV.md#v31) · [ASV](ASV.md#v31) |
| [32](BBE.md#v32) | The sinner is overturned in his evil-doing, but the upright man has hope in his righteousness. | [WEB](WEB.md#v32) · [KJV](KJV.md#v32) · [ASV](ASV.md#v32) |
| [33](BBE.md#v33) | Wisdom has her resting-place in the mind of the wise, but she is not seen among the foolish. | [WEB](WEB.md#v33) · [KJV](KJV.md#v33) · [ASV](ASV.md#v33) |
| [34](BBE.md#v34) | By righteousness a nation is lifted up, but sin is a cause of shame to the peoples. | [WEB](WEB.md#v34) · [KJV](KJV.md#v34) · [ASV](ASV.md#v34) |
| [35](BBE.md#v35) | The king has pleasure in a servant who does wisely, but his wrath is against him who is a cause of shame. | [WEB](WEB.md#v35) · [KJV](KJV.md#v35) · [ASV](ASV.md#v35) |
